title: Rhaphiolepis bibas

This classification suggests a close relationship with other plants that produce showy flowers and have similar fruit characteristics. As a member of the Rosaceae family, Rhaphiolepis bibas is also part of the order Rosales and the clade Eurosids I. Furthermore, it can be specifically categorized within the subfamily Rosoideae and the tribe Potentilleae. This classification highlights the unique characteristics and evolutionary history of the Rhaphiolepis bibas plant.
